basics.name: Julio César Díaz
basics.label: Front-End Developer
basics.summary: Frontend Developer with 5+ years of experience architecting and delivering production-grade web applications using React, Next.js, and TypeScript. Proven track record building complex platforms from scratch — from business intelligence dashboards to cloud infrastructure tools. Specialized in scalable frontend architectures, secure authentication patterns, and high-performance responsive interfaces.

work.name: ConsumrBuzz
work.summary: Built from scratch the entire frontend of Cerebro, a full-stack business intelligence dashboard for business listing management, automated publisher scanning, and analytics reporting.
highlights: Architected and built the complete frontend from zero using Next.js 15, React 19, and TypeScript
Implemented a three-layer data flow architecture (Client Components → TanStack Query Hooks → Server Actions → DAL → API) ensuring secure authentication handling
Built role-based access control system supporting 7 roles across Admin, Agency, and SMB dashboards
Integrated Kinde Auth with secure server-side token management, preventing client-side token exposure
Implemented full internationalization (i18n) supporting English, Spanish, and French with next-intl
responsibilities: Lead all frontend architecture decisions and establish development standards
Design and implement scalable React application with strict TypeScript patterns
Build comprehensive entity management system for publishers, SMBs, and agencies
Implement automated scraping job monitoring and analytics dashboards
Integrate authentication, bulk upload, billing, and document management modules
achievements: Delivered production-ready business intelligence platform from concept to deployment
Established a strict three-layer architecture pattern ensuring security and maintainability
Built a modular dashboard supporting multiple user roles with dynamic navigation

work.name: Second Window
work.summary: Led frontend development for AI-powered educational platforms and a multi-cloud infrastructure visualization tool, delivering two production applications end-to-end.
highlights: Architected and shipped two production web applications for AI-driven educational services from concept to launch
Built an interactive drag-and-drop cloud infrastructure designer with XYFlow supporting AWS, Azure, and GCP resource provisioning
Integrated Azure AD SSO authentication and Stripe subscription billing with webhook handling
Implemented real-time cost estimation engine calculating infrastructure pricing across three cloud providers
responsibilities: Own frontend architecture decisions, tech stack selection, and code quality standards
Design and build interactive React applications with TypeScript, Zustand state management, and modern tooling
Integrate enterprise third-party services including Azure AD, Stripe, and multi-cloud provider APIs
Implement comprehensive testing strategies with Jest and React Testing Library achieving high coverage
Collaborate with backend engineers on REST API contracts and data integration patterns
achievements: Delivered a visual cloud architecture designer enabling non-technical users to design and deploy infrastructure
Built real-time multi-cloud cost calculator reducing client infrastructure planning time significantly
Established reusable component library and development standards that improved team velocity by 40%

work.name: Freelancer
work.summary: Designed and built a full-featured sports betting platform from scratch with real-time odds, live data feeds, and secure user authentication deployed on AWS.
highlights: Built a complete React SPA for sports betting with live odds updates across multiple sports categories
Implemented end-to-end authentication flow with AWS Cognito including MFA and session management
Deployed via AWS Amplify CI/CD pipeline with automated preview environments per branch
Achieved 95% test coverage with Jest and React Testing Library ensuring production reliability
responsibilities: Architect and develop the entire React-based betting platform independently from concept to production
Design and implement secure authentication flows with AWS Cognito including user pools and identity management
Build responsive, accessible UI components with Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui component library
Integrate third-party sports data APIs for real-time odds and live match tracking
Establish testing strategies, CI/CD pipelines, and code quality standards
achievements: Delivered production-ready betting platform within a 6-month timeline as a solo developer
Built a modular, scalable architecture enabling rapid feature additions post-launch
Optimized Core Web Vitals achieving sub-2s LCP and 90+ Lighthouse performance scores

work.name: Legacy BHC
work.summary: Built enterprise internal tools for a behavioral healthcare company, digitalizing employee certification tracking, vacation management, and HR workflows.
highlights: Developed a full employee management suite with Next.js and MongoDB replacing manual spreadsheet-based processes
Translated complex Figma design systems into pixel-perfect, responsive React components
Managed AWS infrastructure deployments and maintained Windows Server/Active Directory environments
responsibilities: Develop and maintain internal web applications for certification tracking, vacation scheduling, and employee onboarding
Implement pixel-perfect responsive interfaces from detailed Figma design specifications
Build reusable component library and establish frontend code quality standards
Manage AWS deployments, CI/CD pipelines, and application infrastructure
Administer IT systems including Active Directory, Office 365, and network infrastructure
achievements: Digitalized employee certification tracking, eliminating manual processes and reducing administrative overhead by 60%
Delivered a complete HR management platform serving 200+ employees across multiple facilities
Maintained 99.9% uptime across all managed applications and IT infrastructure

work.name: ETECSA
work.summary: Developed internal web applications for Cuba's national telecommunications company, building management systems that streamlined regional operations for thousands of users.
highlights: Built a phone line transfer management system that automated previously manual workflows, improving regional processing efficiency by 40%
Developed an employee feedback and evaluation platform with React frontend and Django REST API backend
Integrated frontend applications with existing enterprise systems and legacy databases
responsibilities: Design and develop internal web applications for telecommunications operations and HR management
Build responsive, accessible UI components with React and Tailwind CSS
Integrate frontend applications with Django REST API backends and legacy systems
Maintain and modernize existing codebases while ensuring zero-downtime operations
Collaborate in code reviews, technical planning, and cross-team coordination
achievements: Delivered telecommunications management platform serving 10,000+ daily users across regional offices
Automated employee feedback workflows reducing collection and processing time by 50%
Maintained zero-downtime record across all production deployments

education.institution: Universidad Central Martha Abreu de Las Villas (UCLV)

projects.name: Cerebro - Business Intelligence Dashboard
projects.description: SaaS platform for business listing management with automated publisher scanning, analytics, and multi-tenant role-based dashboards.
highlights: Built the entire frontend from scratch with Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript, and Tailwind v4
Three-layer secure architecture: Client → Server Actions → DAL → FastAPI backend
Role-based dashboards for 7 user roles across Admin, Agency, and SMB tenants
Full i18n support (EN/ES/FR) with Kinde Auth and automated publisher scraping workflows

projects.name: Cloud Infrastructure Designer
projects.description: Interactive visual tool for designing, estimating costs, and deploying cloud architectures across AWS, Azure, and GCP.
highlights: Drag-and-drop canvas built with React and XYFlow for visual cloud architecture design
Real-time cost estimation engine calculating pricing across three major cloud providers
Azure AD SSO authentication and Stripe subscription billing integration
Zustand-powered state management for complex multi-resource architecture graphs

projects.name: BetHomeWeb
projects.description: Full-featured sports betting platform with real-time odds, live match tracking, and secure user authentication.
highlights: React SPA with live odds updates and multi-sport category support
AWS Cognito authentication with MFA and automated Amplify CI/CD pipeline
95% test coverage with Jest and React Testing Library
90+ Lighthouse performance score with sub-2s load times

projects.name: Professional Portfolio
projects.description: Personal portfolio and CV website built for performance, accessibility, and SEO.
highlights: Built with Astro achieving 100 Lighthouse performance score and fast static page loads
Dark/light mode toggle with multiple customizable themes
Fully responsive design with print-optimized CV export for PDF generation

projects.name: Employee Management Suite
projects.description: Enterprise HR platform for certification tracking, vacation scheduling, and employee onboarding across multiple healthcare facilities.
highlights: Next.js application with MongoDB backend serving 200+ employees
Digitalized manual HR processes reducing administrative overhead by 60%
Pixel-perfect implementation from Figma designs with role-based access control

projects.name: Telecommunications Management System
projects.description: Internal platform for managing phone line transfers and employee evaluations for Cuba's national telecom provider.
highlights: React frontend integrated with Django REST API backend
Served 10,000+ daily users across regional telecommunications offices
Automated manual workflows improving regional processing efficiency by 40%
